name: unfound accident
cooked: Hey, thanks for your great work! I am planning on doing what Ben described and just make the pcb from scratch as a hobby project (not planning to add any high end audio fx features for now, just turning the thing into a usable portable music player first). Could you also DM me the pinout/PCB knowledge you have got so far? would save me some time to focus on PCB design!
raw: Hey, thanks for your great work! I am planning on doing what Ben described and just make the pcb from scratch as a hobby project (not planning to add any high end audio fx features for now, just turning the thing into a usable portable music player first). Could you also DM me the pinout/PCB knowledge you have got so far? would save me some time to focus on PCB design!
